subcodes.first_line: The Beauty hath indeed advanced from within the Kingdom of Glory, and though He tarried in His manifestation, verily He is the Ancient, the Everlasting One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تقدم الجمال من فی ملکوت الاجلال ولو تاخر فی الظهور انه لهو الباقی القدیم
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @absolute freedom; independence of God
